description: New starter requires access to shared mailbox and departmental SharePoint site.
Laptop screen cracked. User unable to work effectively. Replacement requested.
Invoice submitted in November has not been paid. Supplier is chasing. PO number TBC.
User locked out of Oracle Financials after password expiry.
Query about annual leave carry-over entitlement at end of leave year.
Case management system throwing error on case submission. Affects team of 12 users.
Request to procure 5 additional software licences for data analysis tool. Below threshold procurement.
New starter requires Jira, Confluence, and HR portal access.
Budget transfer request between two cost centres. Authorisation chain unclear. Requires Director sign-off.
Printer on second floor not responding to network. Affecting 20 staff.
User requires read access to restricted policy document library.
Manager requesting guidance on performance improvement process for a team member.
Power BI report failing to refresh — data gateway timeout error.
Request for contract extension with existing supplier. Original contract value £45,000.
Leavers access removal — 3 accounts to be deactivated.
Query about correct cost centre code for a new project. Project code not yet set up in Oracle.
Formal grievance submitted by a member of staff. Requires HR to appoint investigating officer.
Keyboard and mouse unresponsive on desktop PC. USB ports suspected faulty.
Contractor joining for 3-month engagement. Requires full system access provisioning.
Outlook not syncing calendar invites from external organisations correctly.
Urgent requirement for specialist consultancy support. Budget holder approval obtained. Above-threshold procurement — full OJEU process may be required.
Request to vire £15,000 from one programme budget to another. Both budget holders have approved.
MFA reset required — user changed mobile device and cannot authenticate.
Query about flexible working policy — compressed hours request.
Server room UPS fault alarm triggered. Potential risk to critical infrastructure. Specialist engineer attendance required.
New starter — full access provisioning including VPN, email, and intranet.
Teams calls dropping after 10 minutes for a group of users on one floor. Suspected network issue.
Expenses claim submitted 6 weeks ago has not been reimbursed. Oracle showing claim as approved.
Call-off from existing framework agreement. Value £28,000. Standard approval route.
Team restructure — 3 posts at risk of redundancy. HR advice required on process and timeline.
User requires elevated permissions to install approved software on managed device.
HR system (Oracle HCM) unavailable for 4 hours. Payroll processing deadline at risk. Escalated to supplier.
New joiner — standard access pack provisioning.
Year-end accruals guidance requested by three budget holders simultaneously. Requires Finance to issue guidance note.
Monitor on standing desk flickering. Display driver update not resolved the issue.
New supplier onboarding — supplier not currently on approved list. Due diligence checks required.
Query about probation period extension. Manager requesting guidance.
Bulk access provisioning for 8 new starters joining same team on same date.
Excel crashing when opening large files (>50MB). User on older hardware.
Petty cash reconciliation discrepancy of £12. Receipts provided.
VPN access required for remote working from overseas location for 2 weeks.
Allegation of workplace bullying. Preliminary assessment required before deciding whether to proceed to formal investigation.
Contract renewal — existing supplier, 2-year term, value £120,000. Requires senior commercial approval.
Docking station not recognising external monitor on one port. Second port working.
Shared reporting dashboard returning inconsistent figures for two different users running the same report.
Role change — existing user requires access to additional system after promotion.
Audit query regarding capital vs revenue classification of a £200,000 spend item. External auditors require response within 5 working days.
Leaver process — access removal across 6 systems. Last working day confirmed.
Secondment request — civil servant from another department seeking 6-month placement.
Purchase of office supplies via approved supplier. Value £340. Below micro-procurement threshold.
Data pipeline failing overnight — Airflow DAG throwing a connection timeout to the AWS RDS instance. Morning reports not populated. Impacting senior leadership dashboards.
New starter in Digital Services requires access to Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and AWS dev environment.
Manager requesting advice on managing a team member who has been persistently late. Informal process guidance needed before any formal steps.
Query on correct treatment of a software subscription in the accounts — capital vs opex classification sought.
Webcam not detected on laptop after Windows update. Video calls affected. Driver reinstall did not resolve.
Emergency procurement required for replacement server hardware following UPS failure. Budget holder approval obtained. Single-source justification being prepared.
Active Directory synchronisation failure causing users in Leeds office to be unable to log in. Affects approximately 30 staff. Escalated to senior engineer.
Bulk leaver processing — 5 accounts to be deactivated following end of fixed-term contracts.
Employee querying enhanced maternity pay entitlement and whether qualifying period has been met.
Three invoices from the same supplier queued for payment but purchase order has insufficient remaining balance. PO amendment requested.
Power BI Desktop crashing when publishing to the service from a specific user's machine. Workaround via web browser identified.
Visiting auditors require temporary read-only access to finance system and SharePoint document library for 10 working days.
Request to add a new work stream to an existing contract. Scope change assessment required. Contract value would increase from £80,000 to £105,000.
TUPE consultation required following decision to bring an outsourced service in-house. Legal advice being sought. HR to coordinate consultation process.
Headset microphone not working during calls. Tested on second device — confirmed hardware fault. Replacement issued from stock.
Underspend of £380,000 identified in quarter 3 forecast. Director requires options appraisal for redeployment of funds before year-end. Urgent.
Case management system search function returning no results when filtering by date range. Affects all users. Workaround in place — filtering by status only.
Two new starters in Finance Operations require Oracle Financials provisioning including purchase ledger and expenses modules.
Query about Special Leave policy — employee requesting time off for jury service starting next month.
Annual stationery and consumables order via framework agreement. Total value £1,200. Standard approval route.
SharePoint site permissions misconfigured after team restructure — several users lost access to key project folders. Permissions rebuilt.
MFA token locked — user unable to log in from home. Reset processed via identity verification.
Request for ad-hoc management information report ahead of programme board. Requires extraction and formatting from Oracle Financials.
Network switch failure in Manchester office causing intermittent connectivity loss for entire floor. Temporary switch deployed pending permanent replacement.
Long-term sickness absence case — employee has been off for 10 weeks. Occupational health referral to be arranged. Return-to-work plan in development.
Azure Synapse Analytics workspace throwing permission errors after tenant policy change. dbt jobs failing. Blocking data platform build. Escalated to cloud ops.
Tender evaluation in progress for new managed print services contract. Incumbent contract expires in 60 days. Three bids received. Evaluation panel convened.
New starter in Strategy and Communications requires access to intranet CMS, SharePoint, and internal communications tooling.
Budget holder requesting a breakdown of travel and subsistence spend for their team year to date. Report to be extracted from Oracle and shared.
Intranet CMS upgrade caused formatting issues across 40+ pages. Navigation menus broken on mobile. Communications team unable to publish new content until resolved.
